DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANTS MOTION TO STAY THE DEPOSITION AND OTHER WRITTEN DISCOVERY -- DAVID E. MAY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. GLORIA D. SMITH APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS DENIED AT THIS TIME. THE MOTION IS PREMATURE AS THE DEFENDANT HAS NOT INVOKED HIS 5TH AMENDMENT PRIVILEGE IN RESPONSE TO SPECIFIC QUESTIONS AT DEPOSITION. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO ASCERTAIN WHETHER PLAINTIFFS SEEK INFORMATION THAT MIGHT TEND TO INCRIMINATE DEFENDANT AND IS THUS UNABLE TO MAKE AN ORDER THAT BALANCES THE COMPETING INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For Leave For Mental Examination
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David May for defendant and moving party: Matthew Sim
Ara R. Jabagchourian for plaintiff and opposing party: Simon Gallagher

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel a mental examination is: granted.
The parties are ordered to meet and confer before the hearing so the Court may order the date and location of the examinations. The examinations are to be completed by January 13, 2006.
Parties are to submit order for January 12, 2006 IME.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Motion To Compel Deposition & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Edward May for defendant and moving party: Matthew Simi
Niki B. Okcu for plaintiff and opposing party: Simon Gallaher

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modifications:
Defendant's motion to compel the attendance at deposition in London, England on August 8, 2005 is denied. The depositions are to be conducted by videoconference on or before August 18, 2005, at a time mutually convenient to the parties. If counsel for defendant elects to conduct the depositions in person, the parties are ordered to meet and confer as to mutually convenient dates in San Francisco, California after August 19, 2005. The depositions are to be completed no later than September 30, 2005. The request for monetary sanctions is denied.
MODIFICATION: Compliance date of October 15, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
